description: Transient startup splash window: core APIs (boot status event + get_boot_status command) and clipboard write for the copy buttons. The whole-bundle OTA flow (check/dialog/download/restart) is driven entirely from Rust (src-tauri/src/lib.rs), so the updater/dialog/process plugins are initialized there but need NO webview-facing capability grants — shell/main.js only imports event/core/clipboard. The 'app' window loads the ordinary web UI over http and gets no Tauri APIs.
